textByHash.036a5139d55553f20d243d382086608e8f79bd94: All of it is incredibly interesting! I slew the great Smolodin Kyatt that plagued the province for many years!
textByHash.14467f5abebd36ad5c165db91afad3a2b0375cae: Funny you should mention boars. I'm currently hunting one... well, I was...
textByHash.1be792039129f69afd652c1d3785e856f4189478: My current quest took me to Acheron, a horribly bitter northern territory, in search for this famous boar. As big as a hut, so the songs say.
textByHash.44d8267c24956e4092a41bae5e1376ce27ffe11a: Hmm... When it comes time for me to venture back to the Isle of Garmr, I'll consider inviting you.
textByHash.4757b2854849892ad0a4e54004eaa7e87421a732: I certainly tried... Perhaps there are some date inconsistencies and a few words I had to guess at. I'd found a lot of scrolls detailing trade with early Fremennik tribes too, which certainly helped.
textByHash.4b9b3024fc83ece8f7bcae6a7a357980e623a46a: Oh Guthix, no! These texts were inscribed in rock paper in a tome even I struggled to lift. The writer left it there as a warning, and I assume they didn't want it to be moved.
textByHash.61609804c9f091c7699525431352a52440ee59a7: Anyway, my companions all met a rather grizzly end, so I guess I'm looking for new ones.
textByHash.8aed997debdf48a6c1756bf902577dce9d2bc5b5: I retrieved the crown of many heads from the bottomless snake pit! I hunted the silver stag of the western provinces!
textByHash.9d6c867134f0602279193bc0ea6e035310452ea1: You must have done something impressive to gain entry here.
textByHash.ae4b687f569d19dc71860217f2644ee3821b5f51: Ha! You're very new here. You've certainly proved you are a worthy hero, but I'd rather someone with a few more years behind them.
textByHash.c611114e29fbd3f1b31968ca029e4c15c940c7d3: Ah, fantastic! I've yet to face one myself, but I look forward to the challenge.
textByHash.d8d1cd86150129e452038cb3f5191da31194d993: I'm Freja, the Kyattess of the Fremennik Province. Who are you?
textByHash.dfcb5ddf14d2cc318cbfb047516cba0f4c68e4ae: Ah, so you've found my latest donation to the guild. What do you think? Spooky, isn't it?
textByHash.ee5836d190fa80e06861d1c303edac52871a39dc: Much like you, I have a book or two detailing such things, but it seems to have gone walkabouts.
